description: Azure IAM/RBAC privilege escalation detection rules

rules.name: Global Administrator Role Assigned
rules.description: Detects assignment of the Global Administrator role to any account. MITRE T1098.
rules.kql:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName =~ "Add member to role"
| where TargetResources[0].displayName =~ "Global Administrator"
| extend Actor=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), Target=tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| project TimeGenerated, Actor, Target, OperationName, Result

rules.name: Subscription Owner Role Assigned via ARM
rules.description: Detects Owner role assignments at subscription scope via Azure Resource Manager. MITRE T1098.
rules.kql:
AzureActivity
| where OperationNameValue =~ "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/write"
| where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| extend Props=todynamic(Properties)
| where Props.requestbody has "Owner"
| extend Caller=tostring(Caller)
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, Properties

rules.name: Service Principal with Owner Permission
rules.description: Detects service principals being granted Owner permissions, enabling automated privilege escalation. MITRE T1098.
rules.kql:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName has "role" and OperationName has "add"
| where TargetResources[0].type =~ "ServicePrincipal"
| where TargetResources[0].displayName has_any ("Owner", "Contributor")
| extend Actor=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), SP=tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| project TimeGenerated, Actor, SP, OperationName, Result

rules.name: Custom Role with Wildcard Actions Created
rules.description: Detects creation of custom RBAC roles with wildcard (*) actions, which may grant excessive permissions. MITRE T1548.
rules.kql:
AzureActivity
| where OperationNameValue =~ "microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/write"
| where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| extend Props=todynamic(Properties)
| where Props.requestbody has '"*"'
| extend Caller=tostring(Caller)
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, ResourceGroup, Properties

rules.name: Privileged Identity Management (PIM) Bypass Detected
rules.description: Detects permanent role assignments to accounts that should use PIM just-in-time access. MITRE T1078.
rules.kql:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName =~ "Add member to role"
| where ResultReason !has "PIM"
| extend Role=tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| where Role in ("Global Administrator","Privileged Role Administrator","Security Administrator")
| extend Actor=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), Target=tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| project TimeGenerated, Actor, Target, Role, OperationName

rules.name: Application Permission Granted to Microsoft Graph
rules.description: Detects when high-privilege Microsoft Graph permissions are consented to an application. MITRE T1098.
rules.kql:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName =~ "Add app role assignment to service principal"
| where TargetResources[0].displayName =~ "Microsoft Graph"
| extend GrantedTo=tostring(TargetResources[1].displayName), Actor=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| project TimeGenerated, Actor, GrantedTo, OperationName, Result
